debug_info.goal:
S : HarmonicOscillator
IC : ClassicalMechanics.HarmonicOscillator.InitialConditions
t : Time
hx :
  ClassicalMechanics.HarmonicOscillator.InitialConditions.x₀ IC ≠ 0 ∨
    ClassicalMechanics.HarmonicOscillator.InitialConditions.v₀ IC ≠ 0
⊢ Time.deriv (ClassicalMechanics.HarmonicOscillator.InitialConditions.trajectory S IC) t = 0 ↔
    ‖ClassicalMechanics.HarmonicOscillator.InitialConditions.trajectory S IC t‖ =
      √(‖ClassicalMechanics.HarmonicOscillator.InitialConditions.x₀ IC‖ ^ 2 +
          (‖ClassicalMechanics.HarmonicOscillator.InitialConditions.v₀ IC‖ / S.ω) ^ 2)

proof:
have hω := S.ω_neq_zero
  have hω_pos := S.ω_pos
  have hk_pos := S.k_pos
  have hm_pos := S.m_pos
  have henergy := trajectory_energy S IC
  have henergy_t : S.energy (IC.trajectory S) t = 1/2 * (S.m * ‖IC.v₀‖ ^2 + S.k * ‖IC.x₀‖ ^ 2) := by
    rw [henergy]
  rw [energy, kineticEnergy, potentialEnergy] at henergy_t
  simp only [real_inner_self_eq_norm_sq, smul_eq_mul] at henergy_t
  constructor
  · intro hv
    rw [hv] at henergy_t
    simp only [norm_zero, ne_eq, OfNat.ofNat_ne_zero, not_false_eq_true, zero_pow, mul_zero,
      zero_add] at henergy_t
    have h1 : ‖trajectory S IC t‖ ^ 2 = ‖IC.x₀‖ ^ 2 + (‖IC.v₀‖ / S.ω) ^ 2 := by
      have hk_ne : S.k ≠ 0 := ne_of_gt hk_pos
      have hωsq := S.ω_sq
      have : S.k * ‖trajectory S IC t‖ ^ 2 = S.m * ‖IC.v₀‖ ^ 2 + S.k * ‖IC.x₀‖ ^ 2 := by
        nlinarith
      have : ‖trajectory S IC t‖ ^ 2 = S.m / S.k * ‖IC.v₀‖ ^ 2 + ‖IC.x₀‖ ^ 2 := by
        field_simp at this ⊢; nlinarith
      rw [this]
      have : S.m / S.k = 1 / S.ω ^ 2 := by
        rw [hωsq]; field_simp
      rw [this, div_pow]
      ring
    rw [← h1]
    rw [Real.sqrt_sq (norm_nonneg _)]
  · intro hpos
    have hpos_sq : ‖trajectory S IC t‖ ^ 2 = ‖IC.x₀‖ ^ 2 + (‖IC.v₀‖ / S.ω) ^ 2 := by
      have hsq := Real.sq_sqrt (show ‖IC.x₀‖ ^ 2 + (‖IC.v₀‖ / S.ω) ^ 2 ≥ 0 by positivity)
      rw [← hpos] at hsq
      linarith [sq_nonneg ‖trajectory S IC t‖]
    have h1 : S.m * ‖∂ₜ (trajectory S IC) t‖ ^ 2 = 0 := by
      have hωsq := S.ω_sq
      have hkv : S.k * (‖IC.v₀‖ / S.ω) ^ 2 = S.m * ‖IC.v₀‖ ^ 2 := by
        rw [div_pow, hωsq]
        field_simp
      nlinarith
    have h2 : ‖∂ₜ (trajectory S IC) t‖ ^ 2 = 0 := by
      rcases (mul_eq_zero.mp h1) with h | h
      · linarith
      · exact h
    rw [sq_eq_zero_iff] at h2
    exact (norm_eq_zero.mp h2)
successful_attempts:

  have hm_pos := S.m_pos
